selected_plan.title: Define the Uigwe wrapper surface without changing the core protocol
selected_plan.summary: Add the documentation and contract pieces needed for a future wrapper while keeping the current planner and consumer artifacts stable.

retained_alternatives.title: Keep everything inside PROTOCOL.md only
retained_alternatives.summary: Avoid a dedicated wrapper document and extend protocol guidance instead.
cons: Weaker separation between planner and wrapper surface

risk_summary.description: The wrapper spec may accidentally redefine core protocol responsibilities.
risk_summary.mitigation: Add explicit planner vs wrapper boundary language.

risk_summary.description: The new surface may fragment the docs package if linked poorly.
risk_summary.mitigation: Update the docs index and cross-link from protocol surfaces.

handoff_leaves.title: Write the wrapper surface draft
handoff_leaves.description: Document wrapper purpose, entry modes, inputs, outputs, and non-goals.
handoff_leaves.why: A future wrapper needs a clear contract before implementation starts.
done_criteria: Planner and wrapper boundaries are explicit

verification.description: Confirm the wrapper doc does not redefine core protocol responsibilities.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

completion_guardrails.description: Leaf done criteria are satisfied by execution evidence.
completion_guardrails.verification: Map every done criterion to passing verification evidence.

completion_guardrails.description: Fresh verification evidence proves the leaf result.
completion_guardrails.verification: Use tests, schema checks, runtime checks, review evidence, or explicit blocker evidence tied to the leaf.

completion_guardrails.description: Execution stayed inside the approved file or responsibility scope.
completion_guardrails.verification: Inspect changed files or artifacts against the handoff leaf scope.

completion_guardrails.description: Dependency prerequisites are satisfied or explicitly blocked.
completion_guardrails.verification: Check dependency status before completion.

completion_guardrails.description: No known regression or must-preserve behavior violation remains.
completion_guardrails.verification: Run the relevant regression check or document the explicit evidence gap.

completion_guardrails.description: No unresolved Uigwe re-entry signal remains for this leaf.
completion_guardrails.verification: Confirm recommended re-entry target is none before completion.

completion_guardrails.description: Evidence and artifacts are traceable to this leaf.
completion_guardrails.verification: Reference the attempt ledger, feedback, files, or command output used for completion.

handoff_leaves.title: Define the wrapper input and output contract
handoff_leaves.description: Draft a machine-facing schema for future wrapper requests and wrapper outputs.
handoff_leaves.why: The wrapper should be able to pass through Uigwe packets and outputs without inventing a vague ad-hoc surface.
done_criteria: Wrapper input and output fields are explicit
The contract refers to existing Uigwe artifacts rather than replacing them

verification.description: Check the wrapper schema for compatibility with existing packet and goal-tree contracts.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

handoff_leaves.title: Integrate the wrapper surface into the Uigwe docs package
handoff_leaves.description: Update the Uigwe docs index and cross-links so the wrapper surface is discoverable and properly bounded.
handoff_leaves.why: Brownfield work should fit the existing docs package cleanly instead of creating isolated artifacts.
done_criteria: Uigwe docs index links to the wrapper surface
Cross-links point from protocol docs to wrapper docs where appropriate

verification.description: Confirm the wrapper surface is discoverable without duplicating protocol definitions.

overall_completion_guardrails.description: Every selected leaf is completed or explicitly excluded by approved re-entry.
overall_completion_guardrails.verification: Check the selected leaf set against completed leaf ids.

overall_completion_guardrails.description: Every Uigwe success criterion is covered by fresh verification evidence.
overall_completion_guardrails.verification: Map run verification evidence to the approved success criteria.

overall_completion_guardrails.description: The run-level execution guardrail aggregate is high enough to close.
overall_completion_guardrails.verification: Compute the run guardrail score from leaf results, success criteria coverage, and evidence quality.

overall_completion_guardrails.description: Hard guardrails are satisfied without numeric averaging.
overall_completion_guardrails.verification: Confirm no open blockers, no unresolved re-entry requests, and no silent success redefinition.
